svg.title: Redrob Ranker — System Architecture
svg.desc: Animated system architecture: pre-computation pipeline feeding a constraint-bound ranking step, producing a 100-row submission CSV.
svg.text: PRE-COMPUTATION PIPELINE · run once · no time limit · LLM calls allowed
↓ rank.py loads all artifacts from data/index/ at startup ↓
RANKING STEP · ≤5 min · CPU only · NO LLM · NO network — enforced by hackathon Docker sandbox
SUBMISSION OUTPUT · spec: candidate_id, rank, score, reasoning · exactly 100 rows · non-increasing scores · UTF-8
